title: The Brave One
writer: Robert Rich, Harry S. Franklin, Merrill G. White
actors: Michel Ray, Rodolfo Hoyos Jr., Elsa Cárdenas
plot: A young boy named Leonardo adopts a bull after saving it during a storm, but their friendship is soon threatened by the legal owners of the animal who claim ownership of it and ship it off to the bullring to face a legendary bullf...
